name: Artisan
text: +1 Card. Gain a card to your hand costing up to $5. Put a card from your hand onto your deck.

name: Bandit
text: Gain a Gold. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them that is a Treasure other than Copper, and discards the rest.

name: Bureaucrat
text: Gain a Silver onto your deck. Each other player reveals a Victory card from their hand and puts it onto their deck (or reveals a hand with no Victory cards).

name: Cellar
text: +1 Action. Discard any number of cards, then draw that many.

name: Chapel
text: Trash up to 4 cards from your hand.

name: Council Room
text: +4 Cards. +1 Buy. Each other player draws a card.

name: Festival
text: +2 Actions. +1 Buy. +$2.

name: Gardens
text: Worth 1VP per 10 cards you have (rounded down).

name: Harbinger
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Look through your discard pile. You may put a card from it onto your deck.

name: Laboratory
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action.

name: Library
text: Draw until you have 7 cards in hand, skipping any Action cards you choose to; set those aside, discarding them afterwards.

name: Market
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +1 Buy. +$1.

name: Merchant
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. The first time you play a Silver this turn, +$1.

name: Militia
text: +$2. Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.

name: Mine
text: You may trash a Treasure from your hand. Gain a Treasure to your hand costing up to $3 more than it.

name: Moat
text: +2 Cards. When another player plays an Attack card, you may first reveal this from your hand, to be unaffected by it.

name: Moneylender
text: You may trash a Copper from your hand for +$3.

name: Poacher
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. Discard a card per empty Supply pile.

name: Remodel
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $2 more than it.

name: Sentry
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Trash and/or discard any number of them. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Smithy
text: +3 Cards.

name: Throne Room
text: You may play an Action card from your hand twice.

name: Vassal
text: +$2. Discard the top card of your deck. If it's an Action card, you may play it.

name: Village
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions.

name: Witch
text: +2 Cards. Each other player gains a Curse.

name: Workshop
text: Gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Baron
text: +1 Buy. You may discard an Estate for +$4. If you don't, gain an Estate.

name: Bridge
text: This turn, cards cost $1 less (but not less than $0). +1 Buy. +$1.

name: Conspirator
text: +$2. If you've played 3 or more Actions this turn (counting this): +1 Card, +1 Action.

name: Courtier
text: Reveal a card from your hand. For each type it has, choose one (must be different): +1 Action; +1 Buy; +$3; gain a Gold.

name: Courtyard
text: +3 Cards. Put a card from your hand onto your deck.

name: Diplomat
text: +2 Cards. If you have 5 or fewer cards in hand (after drawing): +2 Actions. When another player plays an Attack, you may reveal this (if you have ≥5 cards in hand) to draw 2 cards then discard 3.

name: Duke
text: Worth 1VP per Duchy you have.

name: Ironworks
text: Gain a card costing up to $4. If the gained card is an Action: +1 Action. Treasure: +$1. Victory: +1 Card.

name: Lurker
text: +1 Action. Choose one: Trash an Action card from the Supply; or gain an Action card from the Trash.

name: Masquerade
text: +2 Cards. Each player with any cards in hand passes one to the next player to their left, at once. Then you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Mill
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. You may discard 2 cards for +$2. (1VP)

name: Mining Village
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. You may trash this card immediately for +$2.

name: Minion
text: +1 Action. Choose one: +$2; or discard your hand, +4 Cards, and each other player with 5+ cards in hand discards their hand and draws 4 cards.

name: Nobles
text: Choose one: +3 Cards; or +2 Actions. (2VP)

name: Patrol
text: +3 Cards. Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Put the Victory cards and Curses into your hand. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Pawn
text: Choose two different options: +1 Card; +1 Action; +1 Buy; +$1.

name: Replace
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $2 more. If the gained card is an Action or Treasure, put it on your deck. If it's a Victory card, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Secret Passage
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action. Take a card from your hand and put it anywhere in your deck.

name: Shanty Town
text: +2 Actions. Reveal your hand. If you have no Action cards in hand, +2 Cards.

name: Steward
text: Choose one: +2 Cards; or +$2; or trash 2 cards from your hand.

name: Swindler
text: +$2. Each other player trashes the top card of their deck and gains a card of the same cost that you choose.

name: Torturer
text: +3 Cards. Each other player either discards 2 cards or gains a Curse to their hand, their choice.

name: Trading Post
text: Trash 2 cards from your hand. If you did, gain a Silver to your hand.

name: Upgrade
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing exactly $1 more than it.

name: Wishing Well
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Name a card, then reveal the top card of your deck. If it's the named card, put it into your hand.

name: Bazaar
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. +$1.

name: Caravan
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. At the start of your next turn, +1 Card.

name: Cutpurse
text: +$2. Each other player discards a Copper from their hand (or reveals a hand with no Copper).

name: Fishing Village
text: +2 Actions. +$1. At the start of your next turn: +1 Action, +$1.

name: Ghost Ship
text: +2 Cards. Each other player with 4 or more cards in hand puts cards from their hand onto their deck until they have 3 cards in hand.

name: Haven
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Set aside a card from your hand face down. At the start of your next turn, put it into your hand.

name: Island
text: Set aside this and a card from your hand. Return them to your deck at end of game. (2VP)

name: Lighthouse
text: +1 Action. +$1. At the start of your next turn, +$1. While this is in play, when another player plays an Attack, it doesn't affect you.

name: Merchant Ship
text: +$2. At the start of your next turn, +$2.

name: Salvager
text: +1 Buy. Trash a card from your hand. +$ equal to its cost.

name: Sea Hag
text: Each other player discards the top card of their deck, then gains a Curse, putting it on top of their deck.

name: Smugglers
text: Gain a copy of a card costing up to $6 that the player to your right gained on their last turn.

name: Tactician
text: Discard your hand. If you discarded any cards, then at the start of your next turn: +5 Cards, +1 Action, +1 Buy.

name: Warehouse
text: +3 Cards. +1 Action. Discard 3 cards.

name: Wharf
text: +2 Cards. +1 Buy. At the start of your next turn: +2 Cards, +1 Buy.

name: Astrolabe
text: +$1. +1 Buy. At the start of your next turn: +$1, +1 Buy.

name: Blockade
text: Gain a card costing up to $4, setting it aside. At the start of your next turn, put it into your hand. While it's set aside, when another player gains a copy of it, they gain a Curse.

name: Corsair
text: +$2. At the start of your next turn, +1 Card. While this is in play, each other player trashes the first Silver or Gold they play each turn.

name: Monkey
text: Until your next turn, when the player to your left gains a card, +1 Card. At the start of your next turn, +1 Card.

name: Pirate
text: At the start of your next turn, gain a Treasure costing up to $6 to your hand. When any player gains a Treasure, you may play this from your hand.

name: Sailor
text: At the start of your next turn: +$2, and you may trash a card from your hand. When you gain this, you may play a Duration card from your hand.

name: Sea Chart
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck. If you have a copy of it in play, put it into your hand.

name: Sea Witch
text: +2 Cards. At the start of your next turn, each other player gains a Curse, then discard 2 cards.

name: Tide Pools
text: +3 Cards. +1 Action. At the start of your next turn, discard 2 cards.

name: Treasure Map
text: Trash this and a copy of Treasure Map from your hand. If you trashed two Treasure Maps, gain 4 Golds to your deck.

name: Anvil
text: +$1. You may discard a Treasure. If you do, gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Watchtower
text: Draw until you have 6 cards in hand. When you gain a card, you may reveal this from your hand; if you do, either trash that card or put it onto your deck.

name: Bishop
text: +$1. +1VP. Trash a card from your hand. +VP equal to half its cost in coins, rounded down. Each other player may trash a card from their hand.

name: Clerk
text: +$2. Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand puts one onto their deck. When any player buys a card, you may play this from your hand.

name: Investment
text: Trash a card from your hand. Choose one: +$1 per differently named Treasure you have in play; or trash this for +1VP per differently named Treasure you have in play.

name: Quarry
text: +$1. While this is in play, Action cards cost $2 less, but not less than $0.

name: Talisman
text: +$1. While this is in play, when you buy a non-Victory card costing $4 or less, gain a copy of it.

name: Tiara
text: +1 Buy. This turn, when you buy a card, you may put it onto your deck.

name: Worker's Village
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. +1 Buy.

name: City
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. If there are one or more empty Supply piles: +$1. If there are two or more: +1 Card, +1 Buy.

name: Collection
text: +$2. This turn, when you gain an Action card, +1VP.

name: Crystal Ball
text: +$1. Look at the top card of your deck. You may trash it, discard it, or put it back.

name: Magnate
text: Reveal your hand. +1 Card per Treasure in your hand.

name: Mint
text: You may reveal a Treasure from your hand. Gain a copy of it. When you buy this, trash all Treasures you have in play.

name: Mountebank
text: +$2. Each other player may discard a Curse. If they don't, they gain a Curse and a Copper.

name: Rabble
text: +3 Cards. Each other player reveals the top 3 cards of their deck, discards the Actions and Treasures, and puts the rest back in any order.

name: Vault
text: +2 Cards. Discard any number of cards. +$1 per card discarded. Each other player may discard 2 cards; if they do, they draw a card.

name: Venture
text: +$1. When you play this, reveal cards from your deck until you reveal a Treasure. Discard the other cards. Play that Treasure.

name: War Chest
text: The player to your left names a card. Gain a card costing up to $5 that hasn't been named for this.

name: Charlatan
text: +$3. Each other player gains a Curse. In games using this, Curses are also Treasure cards worth $1.

name: Goons
text: +1 Buy. +$2. Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand. While this is in play, when you buy a card, +1VP.

name: Grand Market
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +1 Buy. +$2. You can't buy this if you have any Copper in play.

name: Hoard
text: +$2. While this is in play, when you buy a Victory card, gain a Gold.

name: Bank
text: +$X, where X is the number of Treasures you have in play, counting this.

name: Expand
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $3 more than it.

name: Forge
text: Trash any number of cards from your hand. Gain a card with cost exactly equal to the total cost in coins of the trashed cards.

name: King's Court
text: You may play an Action card from your hand three times.

name: Peddler
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. During your Buy phase, this costs $2 less per Action card you have in play, but not less than $0.

name: Crossroads
text: Reveal your hand. +1 Card per Victory card revealed. If this is the first time you played Crossroads this turn, +3 Actions.

name: Fool's Gold
text: Worth $1, or $4 if it's the first Fool's Gold you've played this turn. When another player gains a Province, you may trash this from your hand to gain a Gold onto your deck.

name: Guard Dog
text: +2 Cards. When another player plays an Attack, you may first play this from your hand.

name: Oasis
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. Discard a card.

name: Scheme
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. At the start of Clean-up this turn, you may choose an Action card you have in play to put onto your deck.

name: Tunnel
text: 2VP. When you discard this other than during Clean-up, you may reveal it. If you do, gain a Gold.

name: Jack of All Trades
text: Gain a Silver. Look at the top card of your deck; discard it or put it back. Draw until you have 5 cards in hand. You may trash a non-Treasure card from your hand.

name: Noble Brigand
text: +$1. When you buy or play this, each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes a revealed Silver or Gold you choose, and discards the rest. You gain the trashed cards.

name: Silk Road
text: Worth 1VP per 4 Victory cards you have, rounded down.

name: Souk
text: +1 Buy. Gain a card costing up to $5. Discard any number of cards; -$1 per card discarded.

name: Spice Merchant
text: You may trash a Treasure from your hand. If you do, choose one: +2 Cards, +1 Action; or +$2, +1 Buy.

name: Trader
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a Silver per $1 it costs. When you would gain a card, you may reveal this from your hand to gain a Silver instead.

name: Berserker
text: Each other player gains a Copper to their hand. Gain a cheaper card. At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards.

name: Cauldron
text: +$2. +1 Buy. The third time you gain an Action card this turn, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Cartographer
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Discard any number of them. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Haggler
text: +$2. While this is in play, when you buy a card, gain a cheaper non-Victory card.

name: Highway
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. While this is in play, cards cost $1 less, but not less than $0.

name: Inn
text: +2 Cards. +2 Actions. Discard 2 cards. When you gain this, look through your discard pile (including this), reveal any number of Action cards from it, and shuffle them into your deck.

name: Margrave
text: +3 Cards. +1 Buy. Each other player draws a card, then discards down to 3 cards in hand.

name: Stables
text: You may discard a Treasure. If you do, +3 Cards, +1 Action.

name: Border Village
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. When you gain this, gain a cheaper card.

name: Farmland
text: 2VP. When you buy this, trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing exactly $2 more than it.

name: Embassy
text: +5 Cards. Discard 3 cards. When you gain this, each other player gains a Silver.

name: Treasure Hunter
text: +1 Action. +$1. Gain a Silver per card the player to your right gained on their last turn. You may exchange this for a Warrior.

name: Warrior
text: +2 Cards. Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand. You may exchange this for a Hero.

name: Hero
text: +$2. Gain a Treasure. You may exchange this for a Champion.

name: Champion
text: +1 Action. For the rest of the game, when another player plays an Attack, it doesn't affect you, and when you play an Action, +1 Action.

name: Soldier
text: +$2, and +$1 per other Attack you have in play. Each other player with 4 or more cards in hand discards a card. You may exchange this for a Fugitive.

name: Fugitive
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action. Discard a card. You may exchange this for a Disciple.

name: Disciple
text: You may play an Action card from your hand twice. Gain a copy of it. You may exchange this for a Teacher.

name: Teacher
text: Put this on your Tavern mat. At the start of your turn, you may call this: move your +1 Card, +1 Action, +1 Buy, or +$1 token to an Action Supply pile you have no tokens on.

name: Page
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. You may exchange this for a Treasure Hunter.

name: Peasant
text: +1 Buy. +$1. You may exchange this for a Soldier.

name: Ratcatcher
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Put this on your Tavern mat. At the start of your turn: You may call this to trash a card from your hand.

name: Raze
text: +1 Action. Trash this or a card from your hand. If you trashed a card, look at a number of cards from the top of your deck equal to its cost in coins. Put one into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Amulet
text: Now and at the start of your next turn, choose one: +$1; or trash a card from your hand; or gain a Silver.

name: Caravan Guard
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. At the start of your next turn: +$1. When another player plays an Attack, you may play this from your hand first.

name: Dungeon
text: +1 Action. Now and at the start of your next turn: +2 Cards, then discard 2 cards.

name: Gear
text: +2 Cards. Set aside up to 2 cards from your hand face down (under this). At the start of your next turn, put them into your hand.

name: Guide
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Put this on your Tavern mat. At the start of your turn: You may call this to discard your hand and draw 5 cards.

name: Duplicate
text: Put this on your Tavern mat. At any time: Call this when you gain a card costing up to $6; gain a copy of that card.

name: Magpie
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a Treasure, put it into your hand. If it's an Action or Victory card, gain a Magpie.

name: Messenger
text: +1 Buy. +$2. You may put your deck into your discard pile. When you buy this, you may gain a card costing up to $4; each other player gains a copy of it.

name: Miser
text: Choose one: Put a Copper from your hand onto your Tavern mat; or +$1 per Copper on your Tavern mat.

name: Port
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. When you buy this, gain another Port.

name: Ranger
text: +1 Buy. Turn your Journey token over (it starts face up). If it's face up, +5 Cards.

name: Transmogrify
text: +1 Action. Put this on your Tavern mat. At the start of your turn: You may call this to trash a card from your hand and gain a card costing up to $1 more than it into your hand.

name: Artificer
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. Discard any number of cards. You may gain a card costing exactly $1 per card discarded.

name: Bridge Troll
text: Each other player takes their -$1 token. Now and at the start of your next turn: +1 Buy. While this is in play, cards cost $1 less.

name: Distant Lands
text: Put this on your Tavern mat. Worth 4VP if it's there at the end of the game (otherwise 0VP).

name: Giant
text: Turn your Journey token over. If it's face up: +$1. If it's face down: +$5, and each other player reveals the top card of their deck, trashes it if it costs from $3 to $6, and otherwise discards it and gains a Curse.

name: Haunted Woods
text: Until your next turn, when any other player buys a card, they put their hand onto their deck. At the start of your next turn: +3 Cards.

name: Lost City
text: +2 Cards. +2 Actions. When you gain this, each other player draws a card.

name: Relic
text: +$2. When you play this, each other player puts their -1 Card token on their deck.

name: Royal Carriage
text: +1 Action. Put this on your Tavern mat. Directly after resolving an Action card, if it's still in play, you may call this to replay that Action card.

name: Storyteller
text: +1 Action. Play up to 3 Treasures from your hand. +1 Card per $1 they produce.

name: Swamp Hag
text: Until your next turn, when any other player buys a card, they gain a Curse. At the start of your next turn: +$3.

name: Treasure Trove
text: +$2. When you play this, gain a Gold and a Copper.

name: Wine Merchant
text: +1 Buy. +$4. Put this on your Tavern mat. At the end of your Buy phase, if you have $2 or less unspent, you may discard this from your Tavern mat.

name: Hireling
text: At the start of each of your turns for the rest of the game: +1 Card.

name: Alms
text: Once per turn: If you have no Treasures in play, gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Borrow
text: Once per turn: +1 Buy. If your deck is non-empty, flip your -1 Card token face down (if face up); if you did, +$1.

name: Quest
text: You may discard an Attack, 2 Curses, or 6 cards. If you do, gain a Gold.

name: Save
text: Once per turn: +1 Buy. Set aside a card from your hand, and put it into your hand at end of turn (after drawing).

name: Scouting Party
text: +1 Buy. Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. Discard 3 and put the rest back in any order.

name: Travelling Fair
text: +2 Buys. When you gain a card this turn, you may put it onto your deck.

name: Bonfire
text: Trash up to 2 Coppers you have in play.

name: Expedition
text: Draw 2 extra cards for your next hand.

name: Plan
text: Move your Trashing token to an Action card Supply pile. (When you buy a card from that pile, first trash a card from your hand.)

name: Lost Arts
text: Move your +1 Action token to an Action card Supply pile. (Cards from that pile give +1 Action when played.)

name: Training
text: Move your +$1 token to an Action card Supply pile. (Cards from that pile give +$1 when played.)

name: Inheritance
text: Once per game: Set aside a non-Command Action card from the Supply costing up to $4. Move your Estate token to it. (Estates are also Actions with the text of that card.)

name: Pathfinding
text: Move your +1 Card token to an Action card Supply pile. (Cards from that pile give +1 Card when played.)

name: Candlestick Maker
text: +1 Action. +1 Buy. +1 Coffers.

name: Stonemason
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain 2 cards each costing less than it. When you buy this, you may overpay for it. If you do, gain 2 Action cards each costing the amount you overpaid.

name: Advisor
text: +1 Action. Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. The player to your left chooses one for you to discard; put the rest into your hand.

name: Herald
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's an Action, play it. When you buy this, you may overpay for it. For each $1 you overpaid, put a card from your discard pile onto your deck.

name: Plaza
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. You may discard a Treasure. If you do, +1 Coffers.

name: Taxman
text: You may trash a Treasure from your hand. Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand discards a copy of it (or reveals they can't). Gain a Treasure costing up to $3 more than the trashed card.

name: Butcher
text: +2 Coffers. You may trash a card from your hand and then pay any number of Coffers. Gain a card costing up to the cost of the trashed card plus the Coffers paid.

name: Journeyman
text: Name a card. Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal 3 cards that are not the named card. Put those cards into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Merchant Guild
text: +1 Buy. +$1. While this is in play, when you buy a card, +1 Coffers.

name: Soothsayer
text: Gain a Gold. Each other player gains a Curse. Each player who gained a Curse draws a card.

name: Acting Troupe
text: +4 Villagers. Trash this.

name: Cargo Ship
text: +$2. Once this turn, when you gain a card, you may set it aside face up (on this). At the start of your next turn, put it into your hand.

name: Improve
text: +$2. At the end of your Action phase, you may trash an Action card you have in play, to gain a card costing exactly $1 more than it.

name: Lackeys
text: +2 Cards. When you discard this from play, +2 Villagers.

name: Old Witch
text: +3 Cards. Each other player gains a Curse and may trash a Curse from their hand.

name: Recruiter
text: +2 Cards. Trash a card from your hand. +1 Villager per $1 it costs.

name: Scepter
text: When you play this, choose one: +$2; or play an Action card from your hand that's in play again.

name: Scholar
text: Discard your hand. +7 Cards.

name: Sculptor
text: Gain a card to your hand costing up to $4. If it's a Treasure, +1 Villager.

name: Seer
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Put the ones costing from $2 to $4 into your hand. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Silk Merchant
text: +2 Cards. +1 Buy. When you discard this from play, +1 Coffers, +1 Villagers.

name: Swashbuckler
text: +3 Cards. If your discard pile has any cards in it: +1 Coffers, then if you have at least 4 Coffers, gain a Treasure Chest.

name: Treasurer
text: +$3. Choose one: Trash a Treasure from your hand; or gain a Treasure from the trash to your hand; or take the Key.

name: Villain
text: +2 Coffers. Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand discards one costing $2 or more (or reveals they can't).

name: Flag Bearer
text: +$2. When you gain or trash this, take the Flag. (The player with the Flag draws an extra card at the start of their Buy phase.)

name: Border Guard
text: +1 Action. Reveal the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and discard the other. If both are Actions, take the Lantern or Horn.

name: Ducat
text: +1 Coffers. +1 Buy. When you gain this, you may trash a Copper from your hand.

name: Hideout
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. Trash a card from your hand. If it's a Victory card, gain a Curse.

name: Invention
text: Gain a card costing up to $4 from a Supply pile with no tokens on it (from Invention); put your Invention token on that pile. (Cards from that pile cost $1 less this turn.)

name: Mountain Village
text: +2 Actions. Look through your discard pile. You may put a card from it into your hand; otherwise, +1 Card.

name: Patron
text: +1 Villager. +$2. When another player plays a card that causes you to reveal this, +1 Coffers.

name: Priest
text: +$2. Trash a card from your hand. For the rest of this turn, when you trash a card, +$2.

name: Research
text: +1 Action. Trash a card from your hand. Per $1 it costs, set aside a card from your deck face down. At the start of your next turn, put them into your hand.

name: Cathedral
text: At the start of your turn, trash a card from your hand.

name: City Gate
text: At the start of your turn, +1 Card, then put a card from your hand onto your deck.

name: Pageant
text: At the end of your Buy phase, you may pay $1 for +1 Coffers.

name: Sewers
text: When you trash a card other than via Sewers, you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Star Chart
text: When you shuffle, you may put one of the shuffled cards on top.

name: Exploration
text: At the end of your Buy phase, if you didn't gain any cards, +1 Coffers and +1 Villagers.

name: Fair
text: At the start of your turn, +1 Buy.

name: Silos
text: At the start of your turn, discard any number of Coppers, revealed, and draw that many cards.

name: Sinister Plot
text: At the start of your turn, add a token here, or remove your tokens here for +1 Card each.

name: Academy
text: When you gain an Action card, +1 Villagers.

name: Capitalism
text: During your Buy phase, Action cards with +$ in their instructions can be played as Treasures.

name: Fleet
text: After the game ends, there is an extra final turn for each player who has bought this.

name: Guildhall
text: When you gain a Treasure, +1 Coffers.

name: Piazza
text: At the start of your turn, reveal the top card of your deck. If it's an Action, play it.

name: Road Network
text: When another player gains a Victory card, +1 Card.

name: Barracks
text: At the start of your turn, +1 Action.

name: Crop Rotation
text: At the start of your turn, you may discard a Victory card for +2 Cards.

name: Innovation
text: The first time you gain an Action card each turn, you may set it aside. If you do, play it.

name: Canal
text: Cards in Supply cost $1 less, but not less than $0.

name: Citadel
text: At the start of your turn, play the first Action card you have in play again.
